resume.text:
SUMMARY
Senior Frontend Engineer with 6.5 years of experience building React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, and design-system driven web applications for fintech and SaaS products. Strong background in frontend architecture, component libraries, performance optimization, and accessibility.

SKILLS
React, Next.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, Redux, Zustand, REST APIs, Design Systems, Figma, Accessibility, Web Performance, Jest, Playwright

EXPERIENCE
Senior Frontend Engineer, Razorpay — Built payment dashboard modules used by internal and merchant teams. Led migration of legacy React screens to a shared component system. Improved page load performance and reduced repeated UI logic across product teams.

Frontend Engineer, Freshworks — Worked on customer support product UI, reusable form components, and analytics dashboards. Collaborated closely with product managers and designers.

PROJECTS
Designed a reusable React table system with sorting, column visibility, sticky headers, and row actions. Built a payment reconciliation dashboard with export workflows and role-based access.

EDUCATION
B.Tech in Computer Science, PES University.

CERTIFICATIONS
Frontend Performance Fundamentals, Accessibility for Web Applications.

extracted.summary: Senior Frontend Engineer with strong React, Next.js, design systems, accessibility, and fintech product experience.
education: B.Tech in Computer Science, PES University

resume.text:
SUMMARY
Backend Engineer with 5.8 years of experience building Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, and AWS-based distributed systems. Experienced in payments, reconciliation workflows, event-driven architecture, and high-throughput APIs.

SKILLS
Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, Kafka, AWS, Redis, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, REST APIs, System Design, Observability, Unit Testing

EXPERIENCE
Backend Engineer, PhonePe — Built services for transaction processing, wallet reconciliation, and partner integrations. Worked on Kafka-based asynchronous workflows and improved service reliability through monitoring and alerting.

Software Engineer, Infosys Finacle — Developed banking integration APIs and batch processing services for financial institutions.

PROJECTS
Designed an event-driven reconciliation pipeline for payment transactions. Built retry and dead-letter handling for high-volume event processing.

EDUCATION
B.E. in Information Science, BMS College of Engineering.

CERTIFICATIONS
AWS Developer Associate, Kafka Fundamentals.

extracted.summary: Backend Engineer with Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, AWS, payments, and distributed systems experience.
education: B.E. in Information Science, BMS College of Engineering

resume.text:
SUMMARY
Product Manager with 7.2 years of experience in B2B SaaS, analytics dashboards, customer workflows, and product-led growth. Skilled at writing PRDs, prioritizing roadmaps, working with engineering, and using data to guide product decisions.

SKILLS
Product Management, Roadmapping, PRD Writing, Stakeholder Management, SQL, Product Analytics, Agile, User Research, SaaS, Go-To-Market, Customer Discovery, Metrics

EXPERIENCE
Product Manager, Zoho — Owned roadmap for reporting and workflow automation features used by enterprise customers. Partnered with design and engineering to improve activation and reduce onboarding friction.

Associate Product Manager, Chargebee — Worked on subscription billing workflows, customer interviews, and dashboard improvements.

PROJECTS
Launched a usage analytics dashboard for account admins. Improved feature adoption through onboarding nudges and guided setup.

EDUCATION
MBA, Great Lakes Institute of Management. B.Tech in Electronics, Anna University.

CERTIFICATIONS
Product Analytics, Pragmatic Product Management.

extracted.summary: Product Manager with B2B SaaS, analytics, roadmap, PRD, stakeholder, and product-led growth experience.
education: MBA, Great Lakes Institute of Management

resume.text:
SUMMARY

SKILLS
Playwright, Selenium, JavaScript, TypeScript, API Testing, Postman, Cypress, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Test Strategy, Regression Testing, Bug Tracking, Agile QA

EXPERIENCE
QA Automation Engineer, BrowserStack — Built automated regression suites for browser testing workflows. Worked with engineering teams to improve test coverage and reduce release defects.

QA Engineer, Mphasis — Created Selenium-based automation for banking and insurance applications.

PROJECTS
Built a Playwright test suite for a SaaS admin portal. Integrated API smoke tests into CI pipeline.

EDUCATION
B.Tech in Information Technology, VJTI Mumbai.

CERTIFICATIONS
ISTQB Foundation Level, Playwright Automation Essentials.

extracted.summary: QA Automation Engineer with Playwright, Selenium, API testing, CI, and SaaS quality engineering experience.
education: B.Tech in Information Technology, VJTI Mumbai

resume.text:
SUMMARY
DevOps Engineer with 6.9 years of experience managing AWS infrastructure, Kubernetes platforms, CI/CD pipelines, observability, and production reliability for SaaS systems. Strong in Terraform, Docker, GitHub Actions, and incident response.

EXPERIENCE
DevOps Engineer, Atlassian — Managed Kubernetes workloads and deployment pipelines for internal SaaS services. Improved alerting, deployment reliability, and infrastructure cost visibility.

Cloud Engineer, TCS Digital — Supported cloud migration projects and automated infrastructure provisioning.

PROJECTS
Built Terraform modules for reusable cloud infrastructure. Implemented CI/CD pipelines with environment approvals and rollback support.

EDUCATION
B.E. in Computer Science, Osmania University.

CERTIFICATIONS
AWS Solutions Architect Associate, Kubernetes Administrator Fundamentals.

extracted.summary: DevOps Engineer with AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, observability, and SaaS reliability experience.
education: B.E. in Computer Science, Osmania University
